creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank Yuri, for future issues, if you could please create them with the following format, it will save manual effort reformatting:

category/port: Summary or COMMENT (for new ports)

Optional title prefixes are, *one* of:

[NEW PORT]
[MAINTAINER]
[PATCH] (or set the patch keyword manually)

Please also:

Set maintainer-approval to "+" for those attachments/patches that you are the MAINTAINER of tha you want to be committed.

Set maintainer-feedback to "+" if you respond to requests for changes/ additional information

Set merge-quarterly flag to ? if you would like the committer/portmgr to consider the change for the latest quarterly branch (Eg: for build/package fixes, or security fixes/updates)"
